metadata.description: Official Metabase documentation links for API usage, embedding, permissions, and administration. Use for web search grounding when automating Metabase.

api_and_automation.name: Metabase API documentation
api_and_automation.relevance: Primary reference for Metabase REST API endpoints, request/response shapes, and auth notes.

api_and_automation.name: Metabase administration guide
api_and_automation.relevance: Admin settings, security controls, and environment configuration relevant to API access.

api_and_automation.name: Working with the Metabase API (Learn)
api_and_automation.relevance: Practical guide covering session caching, 401 handling, browser DevTools technique for discovering API shapes.

api_and_automation.name: API keys documentation
api_and_automation.relevance: API key creation, group assignment, and permission scoping for programmatic access.

query_language.name: MBQL Reference (GitHub Wiki)
query_language.relevance: Metabase Query Language reference for structured (query-builder) queries; essential for programmatic card creation.

serialization.name: Serialization documentation
serialization.relevance: Export/import dashboards and questions between environments (Pro/Enterprise). Entity IDs for cross-instance stability.

collections_permissions.name: Collections
collections_permissions.relevance: How collections work and how permissions interact with saved questions/dashboards.

collections_permissions.name: Permissions overview
collections_permissions.relevance: Permission model for databases, collections, and user groups (critical for automation accounts).

charts_and_dashboards.name: Visualizations
charts_and_dashboards.relevance: UI-level chart types and settings; useful for mapping desired UI behavior to visualization_settings.

embedding.name: Embedding introduction
embedding.relevance: Embedding options and security trade-offs (relevant when API automation feeds embedded dashboards).

embedding.name: Metabase GitHub repository
embedding.relevance: Source of truth for edge-case behavior and API internals when docs are ambiguous.

community_tools.name: metabase-api Python wrapper (PyPI)
community_tools.relevance: Community Python wrapper with sync/async support; alternative to custom scripts for common operations.
